title: Advances in statin adverse reactions and the potential mechanisms: A systematic review
source: Zeng et al., Journal of Advanced Research, 2025

L2: Statins are the cornerstone of cardiovascular disease prevention but cause adverse reactions through multiple mechanisms
Systematic review of statin adverse reaction mechanisms including myopathy, hepatotoxicity, and diabetes risk
L3: Comprehensive systematic review examining the mechanisms underlying statin adverse reactions, including muscle-related symptoms, liver toxicity, new-onset diabetes, and neurological effects, with analysis of genetic and pharmacological factors contributing to individual susceptibility
